name: Portal Software, Inc.
description: Portal Software, Inc. was a prominent United States-based enterprise software company that specialized in developing billing and revenue management systems for internet and telecommunications service providers. Its flagship product, Portal Infranet, provided a real-time, convergent platform that enabled service providers to rapidly define, deploy, and bill for services using flexible business models. The company was a significant player in the telecommunications software market until it was acquired by Oracle Corporation in 2006 for approximately $220 million, subsequently becoming a business unit integrated into Oracle's broader enterprise software portfolio.
